blocks.text: Hallelujah. א I praise the Lord with all my heart ב in the assembled congregation of the upright.
ג The works of the Lord are great, ד within reach of all who desire them.
ה His deeds are splendid and glorious; ו His beneficence is everlasting;
ז He has won renown for His wonders. ח The Lord is gracious and compassionate;
ט He gives food to those who fear Him; י He is ever mindful of His covenant.
כ He revealed to His people His powerful works, ל in giving them the heritage of nations.
מ His handiwork is truth and justice; נ all His precepts are enduring,
ס well-founded for all eternity, ע wrought of truth and equity.
פ He sent redemption to His people; צ He ordained His covenant for all time; ק His name is holy and awesome.
ר The beginning of wisdom is the fear of the Lord; ש all who practice it gain sound understanding. ת Praise of Him is everlasting.
